title: Li Auto Inc Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Li Auto Inc reported Q3 2024 earnings with total revenues reaching RMB42.9 billion (USD 6.1 billion), representing 23.6% year-over-year and 35.3% quarter-over-quarter growth. Gross profit climbed to RMB9.2 billion with a 21.5% margin. Net income totaled RMB2.8 billion, up 156.2% sequentially. Operating income surged 633.4% quarter-over-quarter to RMB3.4 billion. Operating margin expanded to 8% from 1.2% in Q2. Cash position strengthened to RMB106.5 billion as of September 30. The company achieved a record high of over 152,000 vehicle deliveries reflecting 45.4% year-over-year growth. Li Auto reached a significant milestone of 1 million cumulative deliveries in 58 months, establishing itself as the first emerging EV brand in China to accomplish this feat. Infrastructure growth included 479 retail stores across 145 cities and 436 service centers in 221 cities. The company had 1,000 supercharging stations with 4,888 charging locations. Management indicated plans to expand the retail network to approximately 500 stores by year-end 2024, with upcoming BEV product launches positioning the company competitively in premium segments. International expansion targets included the Middle East and Central Asia.
